services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction (mathematics): 150 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 5 times weekly; provider: Unassigned.
Language processing support (group): 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Unassigned.

goals.text: Given a grade-level text, Aanya will identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Identifies the main idea with 40% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: Given a grade-level text, Aanya will identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy.

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Sustains attention for 3 minutes in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.
